name: create_cell
short_description: Create cells in the current design
full_help:
create_cell

Description: 
Create cells in the current design

Syntax: 
create_cell  -reference <arg> [-black_box] [-quiet] [-verbose] <cells>...

Usage: 
  Name          Description
  -------------------------
  -reference    Library cell or design which cells reference
  [-black_box]  Create black box instance
  [-quiet]      Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]    Suspend message limits during command execution
  <cells>       Names of cells to create

Categories: 
Netlist

arguments.description: Library cell or design which cells reference
Suspend message limits during command execution
